en.extract:
The ferruginous flycatcher (Muscicapa ferruginea) is a species of bird in the family Muscicapidae.
It is native to the eastern Himalayas, the Purvanchal Range and central/southern China ; it winters to Hainan and Southeast Asia.
Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests.

[[File:Muscicapa ferruginea MHNT 226 HdB Chine.jpg|thumb|Eggs of ''Muscicapa ferruginea'' [[MHNT]]]]

The '''ferruginous flycatcher''' ('''''Muscicapa ferruginea''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Muscicapidae]].

It is native to the eastern Himalayas, the [[Purvanchal Range]] and central/southern China ; it winters to [[Hainan]] and Southeast Asia.

Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]]s.

zh.extract:
棕尾褐鶲（学名：Muscicapa ferruginea）又名红尾鹟，为鶲科鶲属的鸟类。
紅尾鶲 （Muscicapa ferruginea） 是鶲科的一種鳥類。
它分佈於孟加拉、不丹、中國、印尼、日本、寮國、馬來西亞、緬甸、尼泊爾、菲律賓、印度、新加坡、台灣、泰國和越南。它的自然棲地是亞熱帶或熱帶的潮濕山地森林。
在中国大陆，分布于甘肃、陕西、四川、云南、西藏、贵州、广东、福建、海南等地。该物种的模式产地在尼泊尔。
